Home.heroTitle: Horizon One: The Market-Leading Virtual Integrated Test Solution
Home.heroSubtitle: We focus on high-growth areas such as automotive and satellite communications, solving our customers' most pressing testing challenges with integrated software and hardware solutions that merge deterministic channels with standardized models.
Home.hyperRtDescription: The core of our platform, providing high-fidelity, real-time ray-tracing for the most demanding simulation scenarios.
Home.raysenseDescription: A series of portable, high-resolution sensing instruments designed to capture the ground truth of wireless environments.
Home.csiSensingDescription: Leverage Channel State Information (CSI) for high-precision positioning and environmental sensing applications.
Home.virtualDriveTestDescription: Reduce the cost and complexity of physical drive tests by recreating real-world scenarios in the lab.
Home.mimoOtaDescription: Our software solution for MIMO OTA testing, enabling accurate and repeatable performance evaluation of wireless devices.

MetaSim.aboutDescription: MetaSim is a state-of-the-art simulation platform designed for the next generation of wireless networks. It leverages real-world measurement data to create digital twins of complex RF environments, enabling highly accurate performance prediction and network optimization.
MetaSim.feature3: Support for 5G NR, Wi-Fi 6/7, and custom waveforms
MetaSim.feature5: Comprehensive API for automation and integration

RaySense.aboutDescription: RaySense is a portable, high-resolution RF channel sounder designed to capture the ground truth of wireless environments. It provides the critical measurement data that powers our Measurement-Validated Simulation (MVS) workflow, ensuring that simulations accurately reflect reality.
RaySense.feature3: Portable and ruggedized for field measurements
RaySense.feature5: Automated data processing and channel parameter extraction

Layout.title: Metaradio.tech
Layout.description: Measurement-Validated Simulation: Bringing Ground Truth to Your Wireless Network

HyperRT.description: HyperRT is a high-fidelity, real-time ray-tracing engine that powers our simulation platform. It is designed to handle the most complex wireless scenarios, providing accurate and reliable results for research, development, and testing.
HyperRT.feature1Description: Infinite ray bounces and support for frequencies up to 325 GHz ensure the highest physical accuracy.
HyperRT.feature2Description: Fully programmable, time-synchronized simulation of all moving objects for precise Doppler shift calculation.
HyperRT.feature3Description: Native support for Windows, Linux, macOS, and Kylin, with a modern B/S architecture GUI and dual Python/C++ SDKs.

CsiSensing.description: Leveraging the rich information within Channel State Information (CSI) to enable high-precision, device-free positioning and environmental sensing.
CsiSensing.feature1Description: Understanding the lifecycle of 5G CSI is the first step to unlocking its potential for high-precision positioning and environmental awareness.
CsiSensing.feature2Description: Raw CSI data is high-dimensional. AI is the key to unlocking its potential by effectively reducing dimensionality and extracting useful features for sensing.

MvsWorkflow.description: Our core methodology, connecting real-world measurements with high-fidelity simulation to deliver unmatched accuracy and reliability.
MvsWorkflow.step1Description: Capture the ground truth of any wireless environment with our RaySense and CSI-Sensing platforms.
MvsWorkflow.step2Description: Create high-fidelity digital twins of real-world environments using the captured measurement data.
MvsWorkflow.step3Description: Run complex, real-time simulations with our HyperRT engine, validated against the real-world data.
MvsWorkflow.step4Description: Deliver validated results and solutions, such as Virtual Drive Testing and MIMO OTA, with confidence.

VirtualDriveTesting.description: Bring the real world to your lab. Reduce costs, improve efficiency, and increase test coverage by converting real-world drive test data into repeatable, high-fidelity lab scenarios.
VirtualDriveTesting.challengeTitle: The Challenge of Physical Drive Testing
VirtualDriveTesting.challenge1Description: Physical drive tests are expensive, time-consuming, and difficult to scale.
VirtualDriveTesting.challenge2Description: Real-world conditions are constantly changing, making it impossible to perform truly repeatable tests.
VirtualDriveTesting.solutionDescription: Our Horizon One platform provides an end-to-end solution for virtual drive testing, from data acquisition to lab recreation.
VirtualDriveTesting.diagramPlaceholder: Diagram of the Horizon One platform
VirtualDriveTesting.workflowTitle: The Drive Test Data Conversion Workflow
VirtualDriveTesting.step1Description: Import raw drive test data from mainstream test instruments, including GPS trajectories, wireless measurements, and signaling logs.
VirtualDriveTesting.step2Description: Our toolchain automatically parses the raw data, extracting and formatting it for use in the virtual test system.
VirtualDriveTesting.step2Detail1: Network Configuration: Extract cell ID, PCI, frequency bands, etc., to automatically configure the network emulation module.
VirtualDriveTesting.step2Detail2: Power Traces: Generate time/location-based sequences of RSRP, RSSI, and SINR.
VirtualDriveTesting.step2Detail3: UI Parameters: Synchronize other key identifiers for comparative display in the UI.
VirtualDriveTesting.step3Description: The processed data is loaded into the system to drive the environment and interface modules, accurately recreating the power variations and network behavior of the drive test.
VirtualDriveTesting.benefit1Description: Significantly reduce the cost of physical drive testing.
VirtualDriveTesting.benefit2Description: Run more tests in less time, accelerating your development cycle.
VirtualDriveTesting.benefit3Description: Test a wider range of scenarios, including rare and dangerous events, in a safe and controlled environment.

diagram.networkDescription: Flexible access network options, including commercial eNBs, O-RAN, or test instruments.
diagram.environmentDescription: Dual-engine channel models combining deterministic ray-tracing and statistical 3GPP standards.
diagram.interfaceDescription: Complementary RF conducted and Over-The-Air (OTA) physical interfaces.
diagram.automationDescription: AI-powered test case design, execution, and analysis.
diagram.conversionDescription: Convert real-world drive test data into repeatable lab test cases.

MimoOta.description: From channel modeling to physical test, we provide an end-to-end solution for accurate and repeatable MIMO Over-the-Air (OTA) testing.
MimoOta.challengeDescription: Modern wireless devices with complex multi-antenna systems (MIMO) require realistic and repeatable testing in a controlled environment. Traditional conducted testing is no longer sufficient.
MimoOta.solutionDescription: We provide a complete solution for MIMO OTA testing, combining high-fidelity channel models, advanced software for mapping models to physical antennas, and integration with hardware partners.
MimoOta.hardwareDescription: Our software integrates seamlessly with industry-standard channel emulators and anechoic chambers to create a complete, high-fidelity test environment.
